{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "EcoStruxure Geo SCADA Expert is a SCADA/control software purpose-built for industrial automation, functioning as an orchestration/controller element within industrial IoT systems; the vulnerability affects this IoT-specific application layer component.",
  "category": "controllers",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",
  "reason": "The vulnerability is in the firmware of a Foscam indoor IP camera, a purpose-built IoT device that functions as an active element in consumer home networks. The flaw exists in the device’s web management interface, making it a device-layer issue.",
  "category": "camera",
  "sector": "consumer iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Honeywell Experion PKS is an industrial control/automation platform purpose-built for managing and orchestrating field devices and controllers in industrial IoT/OT environments; the vulnerable modules are integral, functional elements of that IoT system rather than general-purpose IT software, so the CVE is IoT-specific. The software sits above the hardware providing user-space control and monitoring, fitting the application layer.",
  "category": "industrial controller",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Suprema BioStar 2 is a purpose-built access-control platform that manages network-connected biometric readers and door controllers, making it an active element in an IoT physical-security system. The vulnerability is in the server-side web application (path traversal), placing it in the application layer.",
  "category": "access control system",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Bosch IP Helper is a purpose-built companion/configuration application for Bosch IP cameras, which are IoT devices. The software operates in the application layer and is an active element in managing IoT hardware; therefore the CVE is IoT-specific.",
  "category": "cameras",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "GE Proficy HMI/SCADA CIMPLICITY is industrial control software specifically designed to monitor and control field devices and sensors in industrial environments, making it a purpose-built element of the industrial IoT stack (application layer).",
  "category": "controllers",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "The vulnerable products (EcoStruxure Power Monitoring Expert / Energy Expert / Power SCADA Operation) are industrial power-monitoring and SCADA software specifically designed to collect, analyze and control data from field devices in industrial energy-management IoT deployments; the flaw is in the application-level logic (URL redirection). Therefore it is an IoT-specific vulnerability in the application layer.",
  "category": "gateway",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",
  "reason": "B. Braun SpaceCom2 is a purpose-built embedded communication module used within infusion pump systems (healthcare IoT). The vulnerability lies in inadequate cryptographic verification on the device, fitting the device layer definition.",
  "category": "actuators",
  "sector": "healthcare iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "communication",
  "reason": "The vulnerability is in Eclipse Mosquitto, an MQTT broker implementation. MQTT is a purpose-built, low-overhead messaging protocol widely adopted specifically for IoT communications. The broker is an active element in IoT systems enabling device-to-cloud and device-to-device messaging, so the flaw directly affects the IoT communication layer.",
  "category": "network infrastructure/gateway",
  "sector": "other"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Thermoscan IP is a purpose-built temperature-monitoring solution that functions as part of an IoT sensing system; the flaw is in the software’s installation folder permissions, i.e., the local application that manages the devices, fitting the application layer.",
  "category": "sensors",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",
  "reason": "ABB Panel Builder 600 is an embedded industrial HMI/PLC component used within industrial control systems; it is a purpose-built IoT device whose firmware contains the vulnerable IDAL FTP server. The vulnerability resides in the device’s firmware, so it falls under the device layer.",
  "category": "industrial controller/HMI",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Triangle MicroWorks SCADA Data Gateway is specialized software used to bridge and manage industrial control protocols, acting as an operational gateway in SCADA/IIoT deployments. It is purpose-built for industrial IoT contexts and is an active functional element of such systems. The flaw is in its certificate-handling logic, which places it in the application/orchestration layer rather than basic device firmware or raw communication protocol code.",
  "category": "network infrastructure/gateway",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",

  "sector": "consumer iot"
}

{

{

The flaw resides in the device firmware/embedded OS, placing it in the device layer.",

}

{

}

{

}
